title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
